results.title: Barkha Doshi
highlights:
Data Scientist at DTE
...
Associate Data Scientist at [DTE Energy](https://www.linkedin.com/company/dte-energy)
...
With over 3 years of experience and strong ambition as a Data Scientist, I have honed diverse skills including Python, R, SQL, NoSQL, Statistical Analysis, Data Cleaning, Exploratory Data Analysis, Data Mining, Predictive modeling, Cosmos DB, Oracle DB, Azure DevOps, Azure Git, React.js, Node.js, TypeScript, Microsoft Excel, Power BI, DAX, Google Data Analytics, Exploratory Data Analysis, Statistical Analysis, Data Cleaning, Data Mining, Machine Learning, Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, Matplotlib, TensorFlow, Keras, XGBoost, Seaborn, SciPy, statsmodels. I possess a solid understanding and extensive experience in using Databricks PySpark, MLflow, AutoML, and ML Experiments for comprehensive machine learning model development. I have completed my Master of Science in Computer Science from Wayne State University, with a concentration in Artificial Intelligence. I have a strong understanding of Machine Learning techniques and Data Mining concepts, and have gained hands-on experience using popular Machine Learning frameworks such as Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, Keras, XGBoost, Apache Spark and number of data visualization libraries. In addition, I possess strong interpersonal skills, allowing me to collaborate effectively with a diverse range of people. My proficiency in tools such as Microsoft Excel, Power BI, and various Machine Learning frameworks enables me to deliver insightful data-driven solutions. I am actively seeking Data Scientist opportunities to apply my knowledge and skills with dedication and commitment. My ultimate desire is to grow with the organization and contribute to its success in every possible way.

DTE Energy, a major regional electrical and gas utility, has posted a position for a Senior Data Scientist. This is my data science home, so I can tell you it's a great company and great team! They take good care of their data scientists and we work on some very interesting problems. As a utility serving the public, our work as data scientists as a real, beneficial impact on our customers' lives and businesses. https://lnkd.in/gYY_bddT
...
And being a Data Engineer, I can tell you one thing: AI Engineering is not very different from Data Engineering. We have been writing DAGs to automate and schedule workflows for years, so we already understand the importance of automation.
...
So I don’t know about other domains, but I can say that AI Engineering is actually here to help Data Engineers. You just need a STRUCTURED GUIDE so you know exactly what you need to learn.

results.title: Senior Renewable Energy Analyst | Hirevector
highlights:
to industries in 19 states. But we’re more than a leading energy company... and working at DTE is more than just a job. At DTE, we take great care of each other and our customers, and we use our energy to be a force for growth and prosperity in our communities. When you join us, you’ll be part of a team that welcomes, recognizes, and celebrates differences and values everyone’s health, safety, and wellbeing. Are you ready to make that kind of difference? Bring your energy to DTE. Together, we can achieve great things. Testing Required: Not Applicable Hybrid Role: This role is hybrid, with an established schedule of in-person work required at an assigned work location. Any remote work is expected to be performed from an employee’s primary residence, unless allowed (or prohibited) through the Company’s remote work guidelines. Emergency Response: Yes – Must be available to perform a primary assignment in support of DTE’s emergency response to storms or other events that impact service to our customers.Job SummaryResponsible for crafting short-term and long-term strategies for Renewables business initiatives. Role requires understanding of current and emerging clean energy technologies, in-depth financial modeling, strategic planning, and analysis. Provide vital research and support for regulatory cases, evaluates financial impacts of renewable and clean energy initiatives, and formulates business plans to achieve strategic goals. Stages analyses and plans to senior management and other departments within the company. Span of Control: 0, Individual Contributor. Responsibilities • Develops detailed financial models on a variety of clean energy technologies to facilitate strategic decision-making and enhance the financial performance of renewable energy projects. • Analyzes the financial implications of internal and external clean energy proposals, including regulatory and policy changes, on strategic, operating, and financial aspects. • Assists in creating strategic presentations, executive summaries, and deliverables for senior management. • Constructs business cases for major projects, integrating technology options and financial considerations into strategic planning. • Collaborates with cross-functional teams to investigate, analyze, and advise senior management on strategic and operational clean energy matters. • Utilizes analytical and financial expertise to support various business units, ensuring sound financial decision-making. • Acts as an internal consultant for the Renewables business unit, offering insights to support overarching strategic initiatives. • Applies continuous improvement methodologies to identify deficiencies and enhance processes. Requirements • Bachelor’s degree with 5 years of job-related experience within strategy, finance or business, or engineering, specific to renewables/clean energy or utility industry. • Understanding of renewable and storage technologies, regulatory accounting principles and energy market dynamics • Proficient verbal, written and presentation skills; communicates clearly with credibility and confidence • Extensive knowledge of data analysis; ability to summarize data effectively and provide appropriate summaries in response to common business questions • Experience in cost and performance metrics; especially interpretation, trending and writing high level performance commentary • Analytic and problem-solving skills with the ability to identify key issues from a broad range of alternatives and recommend optimal solutions for various situations • Ability to develop and coordinate cross-functional work groups and projects yielding optimal outcomes • Strong project and time management skills • Ability to work with shifting priorities and embrace new or evolving responsibilities Nice-to-haves • Master’s degree in finance or business-related discipline • Experience in Renewables/ Clean Energy job

# Senior AI/ML Engineer
...
We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to develop advanced AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making. The role requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems.
...
Develop AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector
...

...
Python AWS Azure GCP Databricks LangChain LangGraph LlamaIndex Hugging Face AutoGen
...
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports the modernization and efficiency of energy systems.Accountabilities
...

...

...

...
- Develop frameworks for
...

...

...

...
- 7+ years of experience building, deploying, and maintaining machine learning systems in production environments.
...
- Strong proficiency in Python, including experience building reusable packages and scalable data pipelines.
...
- Hands-on experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP, including CI/CD and containerized deployments.
...
- Solid understanding of ML system design, MLOps principles, and end-to-end model lifecycle management.
...
- Experience with distributed computing frameworks and relational/non-relational databases.
...
- Familiarity with Databricks and large-scale data processing environments.
...
- Experience working with generative AI frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face, or AutoGen.
...
- Exposure to agentic AI systems, AI orchestration, or LLM-based decision workflows is highly desirable.
...

## Job description
...
**The Role**
...
Our Product Safety Data Analytics team is seeking an experienced AI/ML Data Scientist with hands-on experience in the full end to end data science lifecycle for artificial intelligence & machine learning.
...
This role requires programming and statistical techniques to solve complex problems and work within a team framework on new AI/ML solutions.
...
As an AI/ML Data Scientist, you will be responsible for working with our customers to understand their challenges and needs, develop new machine learning solutions, work with ML Ops in a cloud environment, develop proof of concepts for new generative AI solutions and Agentic AI solutions.
**What You’ll Do**
...
* Work with our existing business partners to identify opportunities for new AI/ML solutions to enhance processes and enable our team members to be more efficient
...

...
* Prototype new AI solutions, including Generative AI, to solve business problems.
...
* Develop new Agentic AI solutions to streamline business process
...
* Ehnance existing model solutions as business and technology continues to evolve
...

...

...
* Perform testing and validation of data sets.
...
* Work on and refine storytelling skills to convey
...

...

...
* 5+ years of experience in machine learning, engineering, data science, or a related field
* Looking for experience in the following:
...
* **Programming & Frameworks**: Python, R, Java, PySpark, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, LangChain, SQL
...
* **Machine Learning & AI**: Large Language Models (LLMs), Generative AI, RAG, Generative AI, Deep learning, Reinforcement Learning, Natural Language Processing (NLP), SVM, XGBoost, Random Forest, Decision Trees, Clustering
...
* **Data Engineering**: Databricks, Hadoop, SQL, Data Pipelines, Data Preprocessing & Feature Engineering
...
* **Cloud & Big Data Platforms: (**Preferred Microsoft Azure (Data Lake, Machine Learning, Databricks), **Nice to Have** (AWS (S3, SageMaker, Bedrock) or Google Cloud Platform (BigQuery, Dataflow, AI Platform) )
...
* **Deployment & MLOps:** **MLflow**, Model Monitoring & Versioning, Docker & Kubernetes, **GitHub**, Jira
...
* **Data Analysis & Visualization**: Tableau, PowerBI, Pandas, NumPy
...
* Proven track record delivering AI/ML solutions to customers that get continued usage and drive value

...
* Deep knowledge of GM’s Data Ecosystem
...
* Deep knowledge of GM’s Cloud Technology Stack for Data Science
* Deep knowledge of Global Product Safety’s SFI Process

Siemens Energy is hiring AI/Machine Learning Engineers for its Gurgaon office under the Digital Products and Solutions (DPS) organization. This full-time opportunity is ideal for entry-level graduates and candidates with up to three years of experience who are passionate about Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Natural Language Processing (NLP), and Generative AI technologies. results.title: Senior Staff Generative AI Scientist | Wfh
highlights:
Senior Staff Generative AI Scientist | Wfh
...
# Senior Staff Generative AI Scientist
...
The Sr Staff AI Scientist - Generative AI will apply knowledge and experience to real world problems and seek to utilize their skills reduce the cost of healthcare and improve health quality and outcomes. With access to dedicated on premise and cloud based big data solutions, the team can work with a vast amount of structured and unstructured data including claims, membership, physician demographics, medical records and others to begin to solve some of the most pressing healthcare issues of our time. A Data Scientist at Cotiviti will be given the opportunity to work directly with a team of healthcare professionals including analysts, clinicians, coding specialists, auditors and innovators to set aggressive goals and execute on them with the team. This is for an ambitious technologist, with the flexibility and personal drive to succeed in a dynamic environment where they are judged based on their direct impact to business outcomes.
...
- As a Sr Staff AI Scientist - Generative AI within Cotiviti you will be responsible for delivering solutions that help our clients identify payment integrity issues, reduce the cost of healthcare processes, or improve the quality of healthcare outcomes. You will work as part of a team and will be individually responsible for the delivery of value associated with your projects. You will be expected to follow processes and practices that allow your models to be incorporated into our machine learning platform for production execution and monitoring, however, initial exploratory data analysis allows for more flexible experimentation to discover solutions to the business problems presented.
...
- Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Operations, along with product management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques.
...
- Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases.
...
- Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work.
...
- Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA.
...
- Work with production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance.
...
- Participate in other data science teams collaborating with your peers to support their projects.
...
- Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team.
...
- Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform.
...
- Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption.
...
- PhD or Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI.
...
- Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases.
...
- 9+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU.
...
- Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP.
...
- Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets.
...
- Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical and technical audiences is a plus.
...
- Passion for collaboration, learn it all mindset and driving value with AI.
